The '''Kattellyn system''', sometimes known as the '''Atraken system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Rolion sector/Legends|Rolion sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Atraken/Legends|Atraken]].

{{System-stub}}
